action_title_supported.message: Send this media page to TIPICS-tt

action_title_unsupported.message: No supported media detected on this page

error_host_missing_title.message: Open TIPICS-tt once to finish Chrome setup

error_host_missing_body.message: Chrome could not find the TIPICS-tt bridge on this computer yet.

error_host_missing_detail.message: Install TIPICS-tt if needed, then launch the desktop app once and click the extension again.

error_invalid_url_title.message: This page URL cannot be sent to TIPICS-tt

error_invalid_url_body.message: The current page is not a supported media page for the TIPICS-tt extension.

error_invalid_url_detail.message: Try again from a direct video, reel, post, playlist, or course page.

error_launch_failed_title.message: TIPICS-tt could not be launched from Chrome

error_launch_failed_body.message: The extension talked to the native host, but the desktop app did not start correctly.

error_launch_failed_detail.message: Check that TIPICS-tt is installed and not blocked by your system, then try again.
